mapper.select: INSERT INTO agent_content_blob ( scope_type, scope_id, content_type, storage_mode, content_text, content_bytes, uri, sha256, char_count, byte_count, line_count, redaction_policy_version, metadata, created_at ) VALUES ( #{scopeType}, #{scopeId}, #{contentType}, #{storageMode}, #{contentText}, #{contentBytes}, #{uri}, #{sha256}, #{charCount}, #{byteCount}, #{lineCount}, #{redactionPolicyVersion}, #{metadata,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{createdAt} ) ON CONFLICT (scope_type, scope_id, sha256) DO UPDATE SET metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata RETURNING id

SELECT id, scope_type, scope_id, content_type, storage_mode, content_text, content_bytes, uri, sha256, char_count, byte_count, line_count, redaction_policy_version, metadata, created_at FROM agent_content_blob WHERE id = #{id}
